item.title: This is Boyd Kramer, Boyd is a convicted rapist
item.description: In 2022, Kramer was found guilty of raping Ms Lane after she visited his Mosman apartment. Kramer was facing up to 14 years jail, but in a decision which has shocked the community, Judge John North handed the former water polo player just 300 hours of community service meaning he would not spend a night behind bars. https://www.news.com.au/lifestyle/real-life/news-life/mosman-rapist-boyd-kramer-unmasked/news-story/08717910b8bd334edc25ab504dca726f
item.dc:creator: MickTaylorVRussellCoight

item.title: I painted this oil painting of this little dog!
item.description: I painted it on commission! Both me and my client are very happy with how it came out! If you'd like to commission a painting or a drawing from me as well, contact me via my official website: anisjerbi.com Also, join my free live drawing lesson here at 5pm ET today: https://www.anisjerbiartist.com/registration-webinar
item.dc:creator: AnisJerbi

item.title: What Duolingo doesn't teach you, I will
item.description: Source : https://youtube.com/shorts/1-k71jcoOmE One of my friend insisted on me teaching then insults in French (my native language) so I made this video for them. I thought this was very educational and needed to be shared with more people. Enjoy the lesson and let me know what you'd like me to teach you next :) Have a good day, Yuzu
item.dc:creator: yuzupyon

item.title: November 20 - Transgender Day of Remembrance
item.description: November 20 - Transgender Day of Remembrance This day is dedicated to honoring the memory of transgender individuals who were murdered due to transphobia, while raising awareness about the violence our community faces. Unfortunately, given current international trends, the situation seems unlikely to improve for minorities, especially for transgender people. "No one should have to choose between surviving and being themselves." — Marsha P. Johnson
item.dc:creator: KurayFR31

item.title: A special "Kermit the Frog" themed dump in honor of Wednesday
item.description:
https://youtu.be/YRPBUeVOimU?t=18
Sadly, the song lost to some forgettable melody from "Norma Rae"
Henson sadly passed away 10 days after this special aired.
from a 1986 TV special "The Muppets: A Celebration of 30 Years", featuring all of Jim Henson's creations singing along
Belafonte said of the episode: "I seldom do television appearances, but I have always had the highest regard for Jim Henson's taste and artistry, so when I was invited to be a guest on The Muppet Show, I saw that this might be an opportunity to do something very worthwhile. I had a long talk with Jim in California at about the time he was beginning work on The Muppet Movie, and -- given that I have a more than casual interest in Third World music -- I proposed to him that the show might provide the occasion to take a look at the lore and history of other worlds, other places"
Belafonte honored Henson by performing the song again at his memorial in 1990. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=G9Em3vVwsm0
item.dc:creator: Pasquinel

item.title: Hello usersub, I'm feeling bad
item.description: Posting a random picture, but I want to ask if anyone remembers a story where some guy was shaken because he was held for the first time in his adult life. I didn't find it, but I've been thinking about it a lot lately, because of reasons. Can someone share it? (edit: found it, link in comment)
item.dc:creator: xurs

item.title: For Car Meet, I Present a Handful of the Cars of Antarctica
item.description:
Gotta lead with the fabled Ivan the Terra Bus
Trux w Trax If I'm driving down here, it's probably one of these guys
Shuttle Vans. As much as I make the joke about Van 404 not being found, it's probably the van I photograph the most
The Fire Dept. Ambulance getting serviced at the VMF
A Kiwi Hilux and South Pole Traverse (SPoT) tractor parked outside Skua - the station's "free thrift store"
Gotta include the Hagglunds. these things are a staple around here for getting around on the sea ice
The Kiwis have Hagglundses too
The Pisten Bully is another Sea Ice staple
Gunter Tax
item.dc:creator: VosperOfAntarctica

item.title: Friends like these dude, friends like these…
item.dc:creator: BoolGoldenBoy

item.title: Wednesday PHONE CLEARING Meme Dump #231
item.description:
1. I had this going a bit differently in my head
2. NGL got us in the first half
3. Would still date
4
5. How is living with your significant other. Can confirm - girls leave cups EVERYWHERE. Gotta be in 50 cm close to cup at any point in the house or they will die of dehydration apparently, or so I've theorized
6
7. I like to do the exact same thing on my weekends (except the parachute stuff)
8. Big Chonk Trying To Escape
9
10
11
12. Here is how to impress girls with your athleticism and flexibility
13. When you finally decide to take your fitness seriously
14. And to end the dump with some wise words
15. Guys and gals if you enjoyed this dump you might enjoy my silly wacky Stanley Parable inspired narrative game called Do Not Press The Button (To Delete The Multiverse). Please help out with a wishlist as this support helps ous small indie devs that are doing everything on 0 budget: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2682450/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse_Demo/ P.S. Have a great week!
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: Ouch, this burn will leave a mark.
item.description: EDIT: Thanks for the frontpage, Imgurians! Remember to be kind to each other! I do some reviews (As a hobby, not paid!) at https://hypeimmune.wordpress.com/ feel free to check them!
item.dc:creator: Skullwriter
